# Obsidian Ridge Labs

> Independent Apple software studio building private, offline-first AI apps whose core intelligence runs on-device.

- [Full content directory](https://obsidianridgelabs.com/llms-full.txt): Complete product facts, conversational answers, articles, and help documentation.
- [App collection](https://obsidianridgelabs.com/download): Current availability, compatibility, pricing, and connection disclosures.
- [Local-first philosophy](https://obsidianridgelabs.com/philosophy): The principles behind on-device processing and offline-ready software.
- [Privacy model](https://obsidianridgelabs.com/privacy): Product-specific local processing and optional network connections.
- [Help center](https://obsidianridgelabs.com/help): Setup, privacy, troubleshooting, and feature guides.

## Products

- [Echo Chamber](https://obsidianridgelabs.com/apps/echochamber): Available on the App Store. Private audio and video transcription with targeted speech enhancement, on-device Parakeet TDT, approximately 4.5% internal observed WER for the complete enhanced pipeline under tested conditions, Apple Intelligence with a bundled Bonsai 1.7B fallback, searchable recordings, AI notes, export, and a $79.99 Lifetime option.
- [Vault](https://obsidianridgelabs.com/apps/vault): In development. Local-first spending intelligence with manual tracking and optional Plaid bank sync.
- [Molehill](https://obsidianridgelabs.com/apps/molehill): In development. A gentle focus tool designed to turn an overwhelming task into one next step.
- [Cove](https://obsidianridgelabs.com/apps/cove): In development. A private iPhone journal with local reflection, patterns, grounded recall, app lock, and export.
- [Wove](https://obsidianridgelabs.com/apps/wove): In development. A private iPhone and iPad wardrobe with local garment capture, styling, wear history, capsules, and packing.
- [Mettle](https://obsidianridgelabs.com/apps/mettle): In development. An explainable iPhone strength coach with deterministic prescriptions and an Apple Watch remote.
- [Memora](https://obsidianridgelabs.com/apps/memora): In development. A private flashcard and FSRS study app for notes, text-layer PDFs, and selected photos.
- [Trove](https://obsidianridgelabs.com/apps/trove): In development. A private home inventory for belongings, warranties, values, and insurance-ready records.
- [Kith](https://obsidianridgelabs.com/apps/kith): In development. A private relationship manager with gentle reach-out cadences and on-device helpers.

## Frequently asked

- **What is on-device AI?** AI that runs a model on the phone, tablet, or computer in front of you instead of requiring a remote AI service for the core processing path.
- **Can private AI work without uploading my data?** Yes. Supported apps can use packaged models or Apple frameworks so transcription, analysis, search, and summarization happen on the device.
- **Does on-device mean an app never connects?** Not necessarily. Model downloads, purchase verification, optional iCloud or Plaid sync, and support can require a connection. Each product documents those moments.
- **How can I verify an AI app is private?** Look for specific answers about inference, uploads, accounts, SDKs, optional sync, retention, deletion, and offline behavior.

## Contact
